message:
test(core): property-based tests for session_correlation, email_notify, event_templates (52 tests)

- session_correlation: confidence bounds, window filtering, closest-candidate
  selection, override bypass, determinism, serde roundtrips, to_external_meta
- email_notify: disabled-always-ok, required-field gating, email format checks,
  credential pairing, EmailTlsMode/EmailNotifyConfig serde roundtrips
- event_templates: fallback behavior, registered template precedence, variable
  interpolation, extracted field availability, severity preservation, builder
  composition, Suggestion constructors, rendering determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
